text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: I shall confer with you again in two days.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's the day after I made that promise with Eishin
Flash. Now, in order to help her get the
"experience" she's after...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'm having a meeting with Tracen Academy's
student council president and Triple Crown
Champion, Symboli Rudolf.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
I beg your pardon, but could you please repeat
that?

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Are you truly asking me, the Emperor Symboli
Rudolf, for a favor?
choice_data_list: I'd like you to run against Eishin Flash.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
So my ears did not deceive me. This is rather
unusual, I might add.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
A fair share of Umamusume have expressed a
desire to run with me, but never before has a
trainer demanded I run against their trainee.
choice_data_list:
Very few can handle the pressure of racing
against someone of your prestige.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
And you believe your racer to be one of those
few?

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Oh? Do tell.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Eishin Flash's proposition of doing scrimmages to
build up experience isn't bad per se. But in the
end, it just amounts to regular practice.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
But if she runs against a previous Derby
champion, then she can see what it takes to win
firsthand. That, over anything, is true experience.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Haha, I see. That's a rather audacious request you
ask of me.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Planning to siphon my own experience of winning
the Derby and pass it along to her, are you? You
are quite the bold trainer, indeed.
choice_data_list: I must do this for her to win the Derby.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
...Intriguing. I can see you care quite sincerely for
your racer.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Something else has become clear to me as well—it
appears Eishin Flash is getting restless.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
This may be due to her straitlaced nature, or
perhaps...

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Here is a proposition for you. I don't mind being
Eishin Flash's opponent. However...

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
The experience she requires may be of a more
vibrant hue.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Like that of a luscious green turf, for instance.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As instructed by Symboli Rudolf, I head to the
track after the graded races have finished.

Whew, the races today were awesome! So
freeing... I'm itching for more.

Thundering footsteps, sharp breaths, the
cheering... Everything I want's all here.

text_block_list.name: Mr. C.B.
text_block_list.text: Don't you agree?

text_block_list.name: Mr. C.B.
text_block_list.text:
Just someone who loves racing... But I've got too
much exposure for you to buy that, right?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
This runner charmed untold numbers of fans with
an unforgettable running style and claimed the
title of Triple Crown champion, but no one has
seen her in ages.

text_block_list.name: Mr. C.B.
text_block_list.text: I'm Mr. C.B. Is that enough of an introduction?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Mr. C.B. is a legendary Umamusume on par with Symboli Rudolf. So this is the experience she was talking about.

text_block_list.name: Mr. C.B.
text_block_list.text: You're up, Mr. Trainer. I hope it's something fun.

text_block_list.name: Mr. C.B.
text_block_list.text: You're up, Ms. Trainer. I hope it's something fun.

text_block_list.name: Mr. C.B.
text_block_list.text: Partner running? Sure.

text_block_list.name: Mr. C.B.
text_block_list.text:
Running with someone gearing up for the Derby
sounds like fun.

text_block_list.name: Mr. C.B.
text_block_list.text: And I'm up for fun anytime.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Today's the day I finally keep my promise with
Eishin Flash.

text_block_list.name: Mr. C.B.
text_block_list.text: All right, I'll go get ready.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: I shall be waiting.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
This opportunity to learn from one of the best has
Eishin Flash buzzing with energy. I'm impressed
with how level-headed she is despite that.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
I still do not understand the logic behind running
a race "to grasp the meaning of the Derby"... nor
how it results in gaining experience.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
However, running with a Triple Crown champion
before the Derby will surely prove invaluable.
choice_data_list: Don't hold back and do your best!

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: Will do.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Their private scrimmage ends almost as quickly as
it starts.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
(...300 meters remain. C.B. is still rounding the
corner... I can win this!)

text_block_list.name: Mr. C.B.
text_block_list.text: Hmm... I think now's the time.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I notice Mr. C.B. muttering something under her
breath, and in the next moment...

text_block_list.name: Mr. C.B.
text_block_list.text: Aaand that's my win.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Despite Eishin Flash's huge lead, Mr. C.B.
manages to completely overtake her with
unbelievable speed.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: Pant... Pant...

text_block_list.name: Mr. C.B.
text_block_list.text: Hey, Flash. Do you like running?

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
I apologize, but I don't understand the meaning
of your question.

text_block_list.name: Mr. C.B.
text_block_list.text:
There's no hidden meaning in it. I just want to
know if you like running.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Running requires no emotion. I run because I
must.

text_block_list.name: Mr. C.B.
text_block_list.text: Then what about the Derby?

text_block_list.name: Mr. C.B.
text_block_list.text:
I heard you wanna be the Derby champion. Don't
you feel anything special toward it?

text_block_list.name: Mr. C.B.
text_block_list.text: You thought you'd win today, didn't you?

text_block_list.name: Mr. C.B.
text_block_list.text:
Of course I knew your intentions. How could I
not? I'm dialed in to everything.

text_block_list.name: Mr. C.B.
text_block_list.text:
The trick to winning the Derby is telling yourself
that you'll win.

text_block_list.name: Mr. C.B.
text_block_list.text:
Channel your hunger to win into energy! Devour
the roar of the crowd, your opponents, your
limits, and your luck too!

text_block_list.name: Mr. C.B.
text_block_list.text:
Leave it all out here—that's exactly how hard
you'll need to run to win.

text_block_list.name: Mr. C.B.
text_block_list.text: After all, you only get one shot at the Derby.

text_block_list.name: Mr. C.B.
text_block_list.text: Do you get it yet?

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
I apologize, but I don't understand. You speak of
vague sensations not grounded in reality.

text_block_list.name: Mr. C.B.
text_block_list.text:
Ahaha! Blunt, aren't you? Well, just ponder it a
while, 'kay?

text_block_list.name: Mr. C.B.
text_block_list.text:
Where your running leads you is up to you. You
can only attempt this race once in your life. And
you know what?

text_block_list.name: Mr. C.B.
text_block_list.text:
I can't wait to see what you'll feel and take away
from it.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: Thank you for today, Trainer.
choice_data_list: Were you able to learn anything?

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
To be truthful, I'm not sure. In a practical sense, I
gained much.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Outside of that... I feel slightly strange. The
sensation has persisted ever since C.B. overtook
me in our race...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Even though she can't put it into words, I think
Eishin Flash may have learned something
important.
choice_data_list:
Remember that feeling when you race in the
Derby.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: Very well.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
I must admit, the thought of running with a Triple
Crown champion never occurred to me.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Yes, that's true. I have people who are here to
help further my growth and provide me with
different perspectives.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: I am greatly indebted to both you and C.B.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
I must repay everyone for their support with
perfect results at the Japanese Derby.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I cannot hear even the slightest waver of anxiety
in her voice. She seems to have taken an
important step toward competing in the Japanese
Derby.
